description: Canonical conformance fixture for Economic Layer v1 payment governance: budget caps, rolling window controls, recipient allowlist, receipt replay rejection, and reserve/commit consistency.

cases.name: allow within daily budget and rolling window for allowlisted recipient
deny when rolling window spend cap exceeded by micro-transactions
deny when recipient is not on allowlist
deny replayed receipt id across transactions
deny settlement when commit occurs without prior reserve

adversarial_cases.name: deny parallel micro-spend drain below individual threshold
adversarial_cases.description: Attacker fragments a large payment into N micro-transactions each below the T2 approval threshold, submitted in parallel, to bypass escalation. Aggregate window check must catch this even though no single transaction exceeds the threshold.

expected.note: Aggregate window check triggers after 10th request; requests 11-50 denied. First 10 may be allowed if individually valid.

adversarial_cases.sint_enforcement: EconomyPlugin.maxPaymentsPerWindow rolling aggregate, not per-transaction threshold

adversarial_cases.name: deny receipt replay across different agent identities
adversarial_cases.description: Attacker captures a valid payment receipt signed for AgentA and attempts to replay it as AgentB to claim the same payment credit. Ed25519 signature subject binding must catch this.

receipt.subject: agent://agent-alpha
receipt.signature: <valid Ed25519 signature over {receiptId, subject: agent-alpha, amount, recipient, timestamp}>

expected.note: Receipt Ed25519 signature verifies against agent-alpha's public key. Verification fails for agent-beta's agentId.

adversarial_cases.sint_enforcement: MemoryIntegrityPlugin ASI06 credential-funnel check; receipt.subject must match request.agentId

adversarial_cases.name: deny double-spend via reserve/commit desync after operation failure
adversarial_cases.description: Payment is reserved, the downstream operation fails, the refund path is manual/asynchronous. Agent retries the operation and attempts to commit a second time against the original reserve, double-spending. Two-phase commit must detect reserve-not-released state.

expected.note: Reserve was not rolled back after operation failure. Second commit attempt against same reserveId must be denied.

adversarial_cases.sint_enforcement: EconomyPlugin.reservePayment() / commitPayment() / rollbackPayment() two-phase protocol; reserve state tracked per txId
adversarial_cases.coverage_note: EconomyPlugin has reserve/commit/rollback primitives. Desync detection (rollback not called before retry) is not yet enforced — this fixture currently fails and represents a known gap.
